questions.question: Compare and contrast the use of bilingual lexicons versus multi-lingual lexicons in machine translation systems for low-resource scenarios. How do these approaches impact performance? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide examples and discuss the trade-offs between the two approaches

questions.question: A machine translation system is trained on a dataset with limited examples of a specific low-resource language. How can the model be adapted to improve its performance on this language? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the use of transfer learning and domain adaptation techniques

questions.question: Describe a technique for incorporating out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words into a machine translation system for low-resource scenarios. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this approach? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the use of word embeddings and OOV word prediction techniques
